name: Bran Bread ABM
recipeInstructions:
1. Measure all ingredients.
2. Place the ingredients in the bread pan in the order suggested by the manufacturer's instructions for your bread machine.
3. Select the basic bread cycle on your bread machine.
4. Set the weight of the loaf to 1-1/2 pounds.
5. Begin the baking process and follow any additional instructions provided by your bread machine.
Deb's notes: Excellent! Light, fluffy. OK to substitute oat bran for wheat bran.
